S.FORM: = Evaristo Carvalho = Mntucing hngkawas 1941 idas 10 jiyax 22 ka Evaristo Carvalho ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sao tome and principe ta sayang o kiya ka Evaristo Carvalho, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 9 jiyax 3 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ə*aɾisto ʦaɾ*alħo = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ə*aɾisto ʦaɾ*alħo ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sao tomə and pɾinʦipə ta sajaŋ o kija ka ə*aɾisto ʦaɾ*alħo, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Evaristo Carvalho = Mntucing hngkawas 1941 idas 10 jiyax 22 ka Evaristo Carvalho ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sao tome and principe ta sayang o kiya ka Evaristo Carvalho, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 9 jiyax 3 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ə*aɾisto ʦaɾ*alħo = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ə*aɾisto ʦaɾ*alħo ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sao tomə and pɾinʦipə ta sajaŋ o kija ka ə*aɾisto ʦaɾ*alħo, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
